creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
Created attachment 166525
patch of taipan.c against svn

I have tried to contact the author regarding the license but the mail could not be delivered. Therefore I have kept the Makefile without license entry as it is. 

The output of portlint -A is
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not be maintained by ports@FreeBSD.org.
WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
WARN: Consider to set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
0 fatal errors and 5 warnings found.

Poudiere is still happy. Please find attached the current patch for taipan.c. In the last one I have had a stale taipan.c.orig. I am sorry for that. By the way, I have seen in the output of "make makepatch" that the original taipan.c is from 2001.
